name: orchard-hig
description: Apple Human Interface Guidelines compliance checker for SwiftUI. 22 rules covering typography, spacing, color, accessibility, and navigation.

tools.name: hig_check_file
tools.description: Check a SwiftUI file against Apple HIG rules.

tools.name: hig_check_code
tools.description: Check SwiftUI code snippet against HIG rules.

tools.name: hig_suggest
tools.description: Get HIG-compliant suggestions for a UI component.
